'''竏營h-ch-m''' ('''kazhacham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:highjack|highjack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:highjack|highjack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營h-ch-m
|-
! Lemma
| kazhacham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhacham|thizhacham]] || [[word:jizhacham|jizhacham]] || [[word:shizhacham|shizhacham]] || [[word:kizhacham|kizhacham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhacham|thuthuzhacham]] || [[word:jujuzhacham|jujuzhacham]] || [[word:shushuzhacham|shushuzhacham]] || [[word:kukuzhacham|kukuzhacham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhacham|thuzhacham]] || [[word:juzhacham|juzhacham]] || [[word:shuzhacham|shuzhacham]] || [[word:kuzhacham|kuzhacham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhacham|thuzhacham]] || [[word:juzhacham|juzhacham]] || [[word:shuzhacham|shuzhacham]] || [[word:kuzhacham|kuzhacham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhacham|thezhacham]] || [[word:jezhacham|jezhacham]] || [[word:shezhacham|shezhacham]] || [[word:kezhacham|kezhacham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhacham|thothozhacham]] || [[word:jojozhacham|jojozhacham]] || [[word:shoshozhacham|shoshozhacham]] || [[word:kokozhacham|kokozhacham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhacham|thozhacham]] || [[word:jozhacham|jozhacham]] || [[word:shozhacham|shozhacham]] || [[word:kozhacham|kozhacham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhacham|thozhacham]] || [[word:jozhacham|jozhacham]] || [[word:shozhacham|shozhacham]] || [[word:kozhacham|kozhacham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzhacham|thﾃｦzhacham]] || [[word:jﾃｦzhacham|jﾃｦzhacham]] || [[word:shﾃｦzhacham|shﾃｦzhacham]] || [[word:kﾃｦzhacham|kﾃｦzhacham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhacham|thathazhacham]] || [[word:jajazhacham|jajazhacham]] || [[word:shashazhacham|shashazhacham]] || [[word:kakazhacham|kakazhacham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhacham|thazhacham]] || [[word:jazhacham|jazhacham]] || [[word:shazhacham|shazhacham]] || [[word:kazhacham|kazhacham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhacham|thazhacham]] || [[word:jazhacham|jazhacham]] || [[word:shazhacham|shazhacham]] || [[word:kazhacham|kazhacham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhacham|shazhacham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhacham|goshazhacham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhacham|gokishazhacham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhachamnﾃｼ|shazhachamnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachamnknﾃｼ|goshazhachamnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachamnﾃｼ|gokishazhachamnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhachamshﾃｫ|shazhachamshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkshﾃｫ|goshazhachamnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhachamshﾃｫ|gokishazhachamshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachamro|shazhachamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkro|goshazhachamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachamro|gokishazhachamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachamu|shazhachamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkmu|goshazhachamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachamu|gokishazhachamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhachamsher|shazhachamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhachamnksher|goshazhachamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhachamsher|gokishazhachamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhachamng|shazhachamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkng|goshazhachamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhachamng|gokishazhachamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhachamya|shazhachamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkya|goshazhachamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhachamya|gokishazhachamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhachamyam|shazhachamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkyam|goshazhachamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhachamyam|gokishazhachamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhachamnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shazhachamnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhachamnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshazhachamnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhachamnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishazhachamnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachamnﾃｼro|shazhachamnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachamnknﾃｼro|goshazhachamnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachamnﾃｼro|gokishazhachamnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachamnﾃｼmu|shazhachamnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachamnknﾃｼmu|goshazhachamnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachamnﾃｼmu|gokishazhachamnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhachamshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shazhachamshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshazhachamnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachamshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishazhachamshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachamshﾃｫro|shazhachamshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkshﾃｫro|goshazhachamnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachamshﾃｫro|gokishazhachamshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachamshﾃｫmu|shazhachamshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkshﾃｫmu|goshazhachamnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachamshﾃｫmu|gokishazhachamshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhachamronﾃｼ|shazhachamronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkronﾃｼ|goshazhachamnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachamronﾃｼ|gokishazhachamronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhachamroshﾃｫ|shazhachamroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkroshﾃｫ|goshazhachamnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhachamroshﾃｫ|gokishazhachamroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachamromu|shazhachamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkromu|goshazhachamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachamromu|gokishazhachamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhachamunﾃｼ|shazhachamunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkmunﾃｼ|goshazhachamnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachamunﾃｼ|gokishazhachamunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhachamushﾃｫ|shazhachamushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkmushﾃｫ|goshazhachamnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhachamushﾃｫ|gokishazhachamushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachamuro|shazhachamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachamnkmuro|goshazhachamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachamuro|gokishazhachamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
